programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carter's mission.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers, has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant, Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver. When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately. Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in "war games" against a rival unit and Pvt. Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry, Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer, reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Ritchie claims he keeps being attacked by a giant woodpecker.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob begins to worry after neighbor Jerry suggests Rob's recent sneezing fits are psychosomatic expressions of repressed rage at Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob feels that he has betrayed his dentist friend, Jerry Helper when he lets another dentist work on his teeth.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: While directing the annual variety show, Rob becomes frustrated by spousal jealousies as he tries to pair the perfect 'Cleopatra' to 'Mark Antony' for the lead roles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: After a string of burglaries in the neighborhood, the Petrie home is pillaged. But the police are baffled as it happened.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura sees a weather girl as a threat to her marriage.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recounts the wrath he encountered when he broke his engagement with his hometown sweetheart, Dorothy after he and Laura became engaged.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob finds himself in hot water after giving a television interview in which he unwittingly portrays his wife Laura as a nut.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar Madison falls in love with a beautiful woman who has two children he adores and before he knows it, he's engaged to be married and Felix prepares to lose a roommate.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix has a big commission riding on a new diet pill promotion but the model, "the fattest man in the world," suddenly decides he won't take the job. So Felix convinces Oscar Madison to put on a "fat suit" and pose in the "before" photograph.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar Madison finds a friend with inside information on his favorite sport, horse racing, he begins to win every bet.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix Unger is irate when given notice of another rent increase and organizes the entire building to go on strike until certain repairs and improvements are made to either justify the increase or cancel it altogether.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: A pro hockey player hits Oscar and Felix, trying to patch things up, winds up challenging the athlete to a boxing match.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar become roommates in the hospital in Hospital Mates.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A high school student is the only witness to the brutal rape of his teacher, but his overprotective father refuses to allow him to get involved. He wants to help catch the man that assaulted his teacher, but is he brave enough to disobey his father?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner goes to Los Angeles to take custody of a suspected arsonist and bring him back to Sparta, but the arsonist disappears and is later found murdered. A pretty insurance fraud investigator helps Bubba uncover the truth behind the murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Vic Glendon, the ex-husband of Sparta councilperson Harriet DeLong, has been charged with murder and is facing a death sentence. Harriet's teenage son, Eugene, is most affected by the trial and the conflict he feels towards his criminal father.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A double murder at a local roadhouse is the focus of the Sparta police, and a young witness is reluctant to come forward. Now that they are parents, Althea Tibbs worries about Virgil’s safety on the police force and asks him to consider law school.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: An old flame of Gillespie’s reappears in Sparta to ask him for some professional help in assuring that her land is willed directly to her daughter, the product of the affair that she and Gillespie had twenty years ago. Stella Stevens guest stars.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired by a woman from Cleveland named Marcia Inman to locate her missing husband. Mannix investigates her husband's business contacts and follows a man matching his description after the man leaves what appears to be his mistress' apartment.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Someone tries to kill Ken Mitchell, the head of a toy-making firm. Not wanting a violent incident to be associated with a toy business, Mitchell instead hires Joe Mannix to find out who might have tried to kill him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Tom Fortune, the rising young scion of a mobster family, tries to hire Mannix to shadow his wife, whom he suspects of being unfaithful, when Fortune is gunned down.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A man named Tom Farnon suspects his wife of having an affair, and follows her to his boat where she is to meet her lover.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Police Lt. Larry Gifford follows a tip leading him to a warehouse, where he surprises a man apparently committing a burglary.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is called to the office of an air freight company and asked to investigate some cargo thefts, unaware that this is a ruse to allow the operators of the company to substitute a double in his place.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike and Dan pursue a smuggler who will stop at nothing to locate a dog collar containing stolen diamonds.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a police officer is fatally shot three days before he is due to retire, Stone undertakes a relentless search for the killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Cliff Robertson stars as a radio station owner who builds a three-dimensional television receiver that accidentally intercepts a galaxy being whose strange form and deadly radiation trigger a tide of panic and violence!

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: In a terrifyingly timely story of genetic engineering and political power plays, Sidney Blackmer stars as a popular American President who puts into place a master plan to slowly and steadily destroy the United States. James Hong also stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: In order to unify the nations of Earth, a group of scientists sets out to secretly create the ultimate, global threat -- an all-powerful alien monster -- via human mutation! Robert Culp stars as the scientist chosen to undergo the transformation.

programme.desc: Julia again hypnotizes Victoria and warns her that Barnabas intends to turn her into Josette.

programme.title: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a dissident Chinese student who is being pursued by Chinese government agents.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: An investigation into art fraud leads MacGyver to expose a neo-Nazi group's plan to infiltrate American politics.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will pull themselves into the belly of the helicopter. The number of pins left standing represents the number of live beetles that each contestant will have to eat. The contestant has to climb on a rope that is over a hundred feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line . Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will swim under the boat collecting glow sticks along the way. Contestant will throw a dart and the score that they hit, the number of crickets the they will have to eat. Contestant will be harnessed and raised by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants fall out of a speeding helicopter. Contestant must consume 10 live slugs and a shot of cow bile. Each contestant must cross between two buildings by placing three planks in front of them on top of two tight ropes as they walk.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a 35 foot power pole, they must stand on top. Contestant will select a fortune cookie, each fortune is inscribed with a different pig part. The contestant stands on a skid at the back of a semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To gather as many flags as possible. To play a game of pool and eat the assigned items. To run across shipping containers planting flags.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the back of the fireboat. Contestant will have the option to drink up to three habanero pepper smoothie shots. One contestant will be standing at the top of a fire slide while their partner is standing at the slide-stairs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Cattle Drive continues with various difficulties to overcome, including conflicts between Matthew and Sully, cattle rustlers, hungry Indians, and a prairie fire. Dr. Mike delivers a calf, and Sully helps her clean up afterwards.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Cloud Dancing and the rest of the Cheyenne are told to move to a reservation where they would be dependent on handouts. Dr. Mike, Sully, and the children head to Washington to lodge a complaint and get the order changed.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: While working as a substitute teacher at a high school, Jonathan assigns an overweight girl to tutor a troubled baseball star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark persuade a disabled youngster to join the Special Olympics.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty wants to adopt the boy with disabilities. A custody battle occurs with the biological parents.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: Sho Kosugi ("Enter the Ninja") delivers a heart-pounding display of strength, speed and lethal Ninja know-how in this action-packed thriller that takes us back to the good old days of the Kung Fu extravaganza.

programme.title: Rage of Honor
programme.desc: When his partner is killed during a drug bust, a federal agent throws away his badge and the rule book with it. Arming himself with an array of deadly weaponry including nunchucks and ninja stars, he sets out to settle the score with the bad guys.

programme.title: New York Ninja
programme.desc: Originally shot in 1984 and not finished until 2021, New York Ninja is about a sound technician for a news station (John Liu) who becomes a vigilante ninja in New York City after his pregnant wife is murdered.

programme.title: Ninja Vengeance
programme.desc: In this action adventure, when a martial arts expert stumbles upon a corrupt sheriff and his cronies beating a young student to death in a small Southern town, he decides to give them -- and the local KKK -- a hard-hitting lesson in ninjatude!

programme.title: Bodyguards and Assassins
programme.desc: In 1905, revolutionist Sun Yat-Sen visits Hong Kong to discuss plans with Tongmenghui members to overthrow the Qing dynasty. But when they find out that assassins have been sent to kill him, they assemble a group of protectors to prevent any attacks.

programme.title: Ong Bak
programme.desc: Raised by monks who taught him the Thai martial art of Muay Thai, Ting (Tony Jaa) is sent to Bangkok to retrieve the stolen head of the town's statue of the Buddha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Sebastian's prepara comida congelada de un menú complejo y los meseros están más preocupados por las audiciones para sus papeles de actuación que por servir las comidas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita el Finn McCool's manejado por una familia en Westhampton, Nueva York, y se enfrenta a un detestable jefe de cocina que resulta ser el hijo del propietario.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Bellmore, Nueva York, The Mixing Bowl enfrenta una afluencia de competencia y apenas tiene clientes.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay debe trabajar con un chef testarudo y propietarios sin experiencia para realizar algunos cambios y traer de vuelta a los clientes a Seascape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Fair Lawn, Nueva Jersey, para encontrarse con un personal de meseros indiferentes que lastima al restaurante italiano Campania's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Peter's, un restaurante italiano familiar en Babylon, Nueva York. Descubre que el restaurante se está hundiendo debido a su descarado gerente y copropietario.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a The Olde Stone Mill en Tuckahoe, Nueva York. Aunque el frente ha sido renovado, la cocina todavía sirve comida menos que estelar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay está en la Gran Manzana para remodelar Dillon's, un restaurante indio a solo unas cuadras de su próspero restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Mount Sinai, Nueva York, para ayudar a arreglar el restaurante y salón Handlebar de Bill y Carolyn LeRoy, que parece que se quedo en la década de 1980.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay intenta ayudar al restaurante italiano Trobiano's. Cuando Ramsay confronta al dueño sobre la limpieza de la cocina y el sabor de la comida, aumentan las tensiones.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ayuda a un restaurante mexicano de manejado por una familia llamado Fiesta Sunrise, que tiene graves problemas financieros y es extremadamente sucio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita el bistró francés Hannah and Mason's. El restaurante, propiedad de dos amigos que carecen de habilidades comerciales y motivación, no puede cubrir la nomina al personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Sabatiello's y encuentra a un propietario impetuoso que está muy endeudado.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Black Pearl, un restaurante de mariscos que tiene tres propietarios, cada uno de los cuales dirige la cocina de manera diferente.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dead & Breakfast
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates a 19thcentury Bed and Breakfast in Red Boiling Springs, Tennessee, built by the Cloyd family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Moonshine & Madness
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters: slavery, murder and madness are behind the hauntings at the notorious Graham Mansion. TAPS travels to Virginia to determine the true source of the claims that have taken place at this historical location.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: City Hell
programme.desc: Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frighternity
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Family of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Princess and the EVP
programme.desc: The final day has arrived –it's Grant's last investigation with TAPS. And where better to close out his phenomenal run but at Jason and Grant's very own haunted property, Spalding Inn, located in Whitefield, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Please Sign the Ghostbook
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS stays close to home and investigatesthe Lamda Chi Fraternity House at the University ofRhode Island, where a little girl reportedly fell to her death, and whose eerie presence is still feltin the house.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Serial Killer's Revenge
programme.desc: Jason and the TAPS team head to Charleston, South Carolina, one of the most haunted cities in America and winner of Ghost Hunters America's Hometown Ghost Hunt Contest.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Camp Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Jason and TAPS go to camp! They head to Camp Rutledge in Georgia where a woman has experienced paranormal activity since she was a teenager.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Massacre
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to New Orleans, Louisiana to investigate their first case without Grant: The Jimani Lounge Massacre.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Mothra

programme.desc: When the three-headed Death Ghidorah, an even fiercer cousin of King Ghidorah, begins to destroy the forests of Japan, Mothra, one of Godzilla's longtime allies (and sometimes foe), leaves her island paradise to help save them.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 2
programme.desc: Two young kids inadvertently unleash a giant sea creature which is strengthened from the abundance of modern-day pollution. Mothra's keepers, the tiny twins Moll and Lora, quickly rouse the gentle giant in order to combat this latest threat to peace.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Henderson, un suburbio de Las Vegas, dos ladrones que portaban rifles de asalto emboscaron y asesinaron a dos guardias armados mientras salían con un camión en marzo de 2000 y robaron miles de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 26 de febrero de 1993, una explosión sacudió el estacionamiento del Centro Mundial de Comercio. Seis personas murieron y más de mil resultaron heridas en la explosión que dejó un cráter de cinco pisos en el edificio.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1996, un grupo de políticos extremistas robaron dos veces un banco en Spokane, Washington, con el uso de bombas caseras y la precisión militar para escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Arizona, un cargamento de dinero desapareció en el desierto junto con los dos hombres contratados para vigilarlo. El FBI no sabía si los guardias eran participantes o víctimas de una emboscada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1999, la policía investigó dos asesinatos crueles en dos pequeñas ciudades a cientos de kilómetros de distancia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1988, un vendedor de una disquera en Sandusky, Ohio, recibió un disparo mortal en su camioneta. Después de descubrir un bolso con miles de dólares dentro del vehículo, la policía supo que el robo no era el motivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una inmigrante adolescente fue a los Estados Unidos para cumplir su sueño de convertirse en doctora. Pero un giro trágico del destino intervino cuando se convirtió en una víctima inocente del comercio de las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre de California fue encontrado descuartizado en 1990, la policía puso sus sospechas en un ladrón local, pero no pudieron encontrarlo. Seis meses más tarde, fue atrapado robando un banco de Arizona y condenado de por vida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1984, el hijo de un constructor exitoso de bienes raíces fue secuestrado en frente del negocio de su padre en Miami. Después de que el padre recibió la exigencia de un rescate de tres millones de dólares, el FBI se involucró.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1993, un ladrón sorprendió a clientes desprevenidos al descender por el techo de un banco de California. Cuando la policía llegó, escapó por el mismo lugar en medio de una balacera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de que un criminal con trayectoria cometiera un homicidio vehicular en Nueva Orleans, los agentes del FBI lo rastrearon por medio de sus hábitos y adicciones.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: The suitors unmask their true selves to Robert and what they reveal could change everything. One of the suitors struggles to balance his relationship with Robert and his friendships in the house.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: The remaining guys are put to the test to see which of them truly knows Robert the best. Their patience is tested later when two suitors find themselves having to share Robert on a romantic date. A shocking elimination leaves the house rattled.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert introduces his family to the remaining men and gains perspective that leaves him questioning his relationships with some of the suitors. One man finds himself alienated by the others and Robert is inspired to share more about himself.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert and the final suitors head to a romantic destination where Robert will have to make his toughest decision yet. Robert is emotionally torn over his love for two men but the choice has to be made.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Lance Bass welcomes back Prince Charming and the 13 suitors that competed for his heart in a reunion special filled with drama, fun, heartbreak and never-before-seen-footage.

programme.title: Reunion, Part 1
programme.desc: Sparks fly when the ladies reunite. Erica and Scrappy discuss the end of their engagement. Rasheeda confronts Kirk. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Reunion, Part 2
programme.desc: The drama continues when the entire cast reunites. Scrappy squirms in the hot seat between Erica and Shay. K.Michelle also performs. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline celebrate the next step in their relationship, while Kirk and Rasheeda take two steps back. Waka Flocka promises to be faithful to Tammy, and Nikko puts Mimi in a compromising position for the whole world to see. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leaked
programme.desc: Scrappy tries to juggle all of the ladies in his life. Karlie imposes ground rules on her new man, Yung Joc. Kirk sets out to prove whether or not he is the father of Rasheeda's baby...and Benzino helps him cover it up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Results Are In
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline throw a dinner party for Benzino and his new girlfriend. Scrappy and Bambi deal with a new development in their relationship. Kirk receives the results of his DNA test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: New Help
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline put their big wedding plans on hold to handle some business. Bambi suffers a setback. Kirk takes the search for a nanny into his own hands. Karlie and Joc go from breakup to makeup to bust. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Party Foul
programme.desc: Dawn and Mimi are on a mission to bring Stevie J and Joseline down. Rasheeda pays a visit to Kirk's young and sexy nanny candidate. And when Scrappy's 30th Birthday party puts his two ladies at odds, things turn ugly. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: What's Your Position?
programme.desc: Mimi and Dawn continue their quest to expose Stevie J and Joseline. Momma Dee tries to make peace between Erica P and Bambi, but only wages a new war. When Rasheeda hits a studio slump, Kirk is to blame. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Past, My Ass
programme.desc: Stevie J and Benzino take on their newest venture, but when Karlie and Althea have a run-in at their grand opening, it all goes down in flames. Waka and his family deal with a tragic loss.

programme.title: Change of Course
programme.desc: Stevie tries to apologize to Joseline, Erica and O'Shea begin to fizzle, and Mimi and Nikko butt heads over Althea. Rasheeda, Karlie and Kalenna take a "girls trip" to New Orleans, and a secret jeopardizes Kirk's marriage.

programme.title: Three Way, No Way
programme.desc: Joseline's suspicions over Stevie's fidelity reach a fever pitch. Kirk and Rasheeda take the next step in their relationship, while Kalenna's house guest causes a shake up in her marriage. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: A Bullet In The Arm
programme.desc: Joseline finds out about Stevie's past and there is hell to pay. Tammy and Waka try to move forward after the death of Kayo. Mimi gets a preview of her sex tape trailer. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Round And Round We Go
programme.desc: Tammy & Waka reach a major milestone without the support of their family, while Joseline gives Stevie a new ultimatum. Scrappy's attempt at a peace treaty with Erica Pinkett leads to an all out war. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Release Day
programme.desc: Mimi's sex tape releases to mixed reviews. Kirk's "apology party" for Rasheeda turns sour when Karlie comes face to face with Althea. Scrappy goes on damage control, while Joseline leaves Stevie completely unraveled. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Notorious gangster, Al Capone left behind five tiles that reveal the location of his massive gold hoard when put together. Out of the five tiles, Lupin and Fujiko have three in their possession.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in South Africa to receive a nautical chart from a retired Nazi that shows the location of a sunken Nazi treasure. However, two young German soldiers interrupt the exchange and a skirmish ensues.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in the small city of San Pico in Central America. However, the city was in the midst of a war between the Government Forces and the Guerilla Army. Leading the Guerilla Army is Jigen's old army pal, Giranco.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/11/22: Michael Harris II slugs his second homer of the game in the 9th, setting the Braves up for a five-run inning and a hopeful victory. However, the stars align for the Mariners as Julio Rodríguez and Eugenio Suárez stage a walk-off win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/17/22: Amed Rosario collects four RBIs and hits a walk-off single in the bottom of the 15th inning to help the Guardians edge the Twins, 7-6, in the second game of a doubleheader.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1967 MLB All-Star Game. The AL and NL were represented by some of baseball's best, including Rod Carew, Carl Yastrzemski, Roberto Clemente, and Hank Aaron.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The American League and National League face off in a pitching duel for four innings of the 1980 All-Star Game until Fred Lynn crushes a two-run homer. The NL would take the lead for good in the 6th.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 1986 All-Star Game resulted in an American League win that ended the National League's streak of winning the last 13 of 14 All-Star Games. Lou Whitaker and Frank White homered in the AL's 3-2 victory and Roger Clemens was named MVP.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera vs. Jiger
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch Gamera save the day at Osaka's Expo '70, in GAMERA VS JIGER (1970). Pearl tries to convince Kinga to take a break.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first episode of the 1952 serial featuring Commander Cody's trip to the moon.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: It's Heaven vs. Hell in this short. Plus: bread?

programme.title: MST3K: Track Of The Moon Beast
programme.desc: In Track of the Moon Beast (1976), a mineralogist is hit by a meteor which causes him to transform into a lizard-monster.

programme.title: MST3K: Track Of The Moon Beast
programme.desc: In Track of the Moon Beast (1976), a mineralogist is hit by a meteor which causes him to transform into a lizard-monster.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A race of evil Moon aliens lands in ancient Greece, wreaking havoc for years on the city of Samar. It’s up to the mighty Hercules to end the chaos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Let, Haexa y Vaski reciben a Apolo, el ex de Leticia. Vaski es quien toma el pelo a la novata. Ortega se debate entre Camila y Mariana y JV no puede decidirse entre Mari A y Leticia, lo que culmina en una gran bronca tras la Pool Party.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Abelha y Julio tienen una cita, Hadad es eliminado. Una pelea entre Ortega y Julienne sacude la casa. Ortega, Haeixa, Gab y Angietta se besan mucho en una aventura que acaba en desnudez. La tableta de regalos Deja la suite principal, ella elige a Julio.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bruno, el ex de Vaski, llega y tiene una cita con Apolo. Julienne se pelea con Mari F por Ortega. Muchos besos en la fiesta fetichista y a Gab le regalan la primera suite triple master, con Lua y Leticia, la noche está llena de sexo, confusión y llanto.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Isa, el ex de Leticia, llega besando a Angietta. La noche trae grandes discusiones. Bernardo y Haeixa son elegidos para una cita. Más confusión entre las parejas y la noche termina con mucho sexo.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Julio, JV y Gab reciben a la ex de JV. Vascki, Camilla, Ortega, JV, Gab y Mari F disfrutan de una fiesta fuera de la casa pero no se imaginan que uno de ellos se quedará fuera. En Cabine dos Segredos, el público elige a JV como el payaso de la casa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Haeixa, Julienne y Abelha dan la bienvenida a Bruno. Julienne y él disfrutan de una cita en plan romántico. Mary M da una calurosa bienvenida al novato Bruno y los dos terminan la noche besándose.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock upjocks the secret of a young piano student’s supposed suicide and discovers the keys to her death are jealousy, adultery, and blind ambition when a piano competition becomes more than just a musical affair.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ignoring her father’s warnings, Leanne Mcintyre agrees to defend charismatic philanthropist Gil Stoddard, accused of brutally murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A robbery at a bike rally gets out of hand, leaving a man in a coma.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A wanted murderer carries on a spree of fraud, robbery and other crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man's life includes many trips to prison, and nearly as many escapes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: An ex-con flees after she runs over a man she thinks has stolen her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man with a history of abuse wants vengeance against his ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: An accused murderer escapes from prison and gets creative to evade police.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man's obsession with his ex leads to murder and nine years on the run.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the late 1970s, the FBI had a working knowledge of anti-Castro terrorists operating in the United States. But then a new group appeared, more violent and aggressive than their predecessors.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the late ‘70s and early ‘80s, a legitimate Puerto Rican independence movement took hold in the United States. But a splinter terrorist group known as the FALN was suspected of executing hundreds of bombings in major US cities.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the early 1990's Philadelphia became the scene of a bloody vendetta. The streets erupted in mob warfare. Authorities feared innocent people would be caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the late 1980s the FBI matched wits with a cunning bank robber, a lone gunman responsible for the longest string of unsolved bank robberies in FBI history.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A small town is left up in arms after a local beauty queen is murdered.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A mysterious phone number could be key to solving a teen's murder.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy real estate agent and his mother are found murdered in Missouri.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Finnegan and Tony Angelo take a terrible '68 to a whole new turbo-popping, flame-spewing, tire-shrieking level.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich finish the 1970 Plymouth that has languished away on the farm for so long; they transformed it from junk into one of the nicest piles in the Roadkill fleet, and undoubtedly one of the best at brutal burnouts for distance.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: A '67 Cougar powered by a Windsor-based 360ci stroker and backed by a four-speed is back; Freiburger and Dulcich try to fix a multitude of issues and get it back on the road.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: It's not the size of the car that matters, it's how it's driven; Cotten and Newbern drastically improve the power-to-weight ratio of a teeny '72 Honda Z600 coupe in an attempt to set a record at MidPond Raceway.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: The 1971 240Z rust bucket known as Rotsun has never failed to fail; David and Mike want to get it back up and running after years of neglect and drive it to SEMA.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: The Cougar and the gear-banging are back, but the car now belongs to Steve Dulcich, and the guys are jerking the haggard Cleveland in favor of a 450hp, 363ci, Windsor-based stroker small-block.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve have a great time fixing the Crusher Impala and testing it with 100-yard burnouts.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: Newbern surprises Cotten and Finnegan with a visit to the sacred grounds of Dennis Anderson's Digger's Dungeon; the guys rebuild a busted-up mega truck and take on Finnegan's childhood idol in a race against the creator of Grave Digger himself.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: The guys try to determine whether a leaf blower can supercharge an engine and make power, starting with a 1978 Monza Spyder with a 305 V8 and a four-speed stick.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: A tank squashes a Prius; a shootout between a Toyota Prius hybrid and a '75 AMC Gremlin is all fun and games until the Prius engine goes up in flames.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger and Finnegan have big fun with retro trail motorcycles on their way to reviving a long-neglected HOT ROD magazine project vehicle, a 1974 Chevy shortbed stepside beater, and road-tripping it to the eighth-mile drags.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: David and Mike cross a rusted 1971 Datsun 240Z with a Chevy 4.3L V6 and a turbo from a Ford Power Stroke Diesel to create the Rotsun; the guys expect the revived Rotsun to dominate in a nine-car autocross showdown.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger and Finnegan rebuild a 1968 Dodge Charger using motor home parts; vehicles making cameo appearances include the Macho Grande, the 1966 Buick Special convertible, the ramp truck and the Fury.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich beat on David's '99 Dodge Ram and Steve's '73 Chevy.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: The legendary '68 Dodge Charger General Mayhem gets stripped of its 707-hp Hellcat engine and all the related electronics; Freiburger and Dulcich vow to take it from the dragstrip setup back to its motorhome 440-powered V8 and gravel-chucking roots.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Sam Strube helps finish the 1931 Model A F-Rod and takes it to the track.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: The guys put John Andrade Jr. in a tiny truck and beat him in a mud drag race with the Dirt Track Camaro; Andrade challenges them to see what they can do with a derelict and parted-out Mustang against his 79 Chevy Malibu.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: The guys attempt to check off the final five states Freiburger needs to hit all 50 by taking their junkyard T-37 across New England; the T-37 hits the road, and the road hits back before the guys leave their mark in New York City.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich troubleshoot transmission issues and more in the 1969 Chevy Impala that's powered by a supercharged 498ci big-block V8, then take it back to the track to see if they can finally get their 10-second time slip.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: Cathy Dollanganger (Rose McIver) returns to Foxworth Hall to confront her grandmother (Ellen Burstyn) and exact revenge on her mother (Heather Graham).

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: Christopher and Cathy live together with Cathy's two sons, who have no idea of the true nature of their parent's relationship. When a woman moves in next door, Christopher learns it is Corrine, and long-hidden secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: The horrific story of Sara, a vibrant teen girl who was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father, Don. Her world becomes extremely dark when her father imprisons her in the basement of their home.

programme.title: Girl in the Shed: The Kidnapping of Abby Hernandez
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old Abby Hernandez vanishes while walking home from school in North Conway, N.H. Held captive in a soundproof container, Abby endures psychological, sexual and emotional abuse while keeping hope alive that authorities will find her.

programme.title: Boy in the Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she will have a tough decision to make.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A woman begs for the return of her husband after he vanishes.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: The horrific story of Sara, a vibrant teen girl who was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father, Don. Her world becomes extremely dark when her father imprisons her in the basement of their home.

programme.title: Girl in the Shed: The Kidnapping of Abby Hernandez
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old Abby Hernandez vanishes while walking home from school in North Conway, N.H. Held captive in a soundproof container, Abby endures psychological, sexual and emotional abuse while keeping hope alive that authorities will find her.

programme.title: Boy in the Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she will have a tough decision to make.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules (Kellan Lutz) must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Teenagers (Dacre Montgomery, Naomi Scott, RJ Cyler) who have been chosen to protect the world from aliens do it by morphing into superheroes and piloting giant robots.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: A youth (Asa Butterfield) exhibits an unusual gift that gets him selected for advanced military training to lead Earth's forces in an intense war against Formics, alien invaders that nearly destroyed the planet once before.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot (Jake Gyllenhaal) takes part in a secret government program that enables him to assume someone's identity and experience the last few minutes of that person's life.

programme.title: Fanboys
programme.desc: Star Wars" fanatics take a cross-country trip to George Lucas' Skywalker Ranch so their dying friend will be able to see a screening of "Star Wars: Episode I -- The Phantom Menace" before its release.

programme.title: Bait Shop
programme.desc: The owner (Bill Engvall) of a small-town bait shop competes in a fishing tournament for the prize money to save his business.

programme.title: Delta Farce
programme.desc: An Army officer mistakes three buddies (Larry the Cable Guy, Bill Engvall, D.J. Qualls) for Army Reservists and deploys them to Iraq, but their vehicle is prematurely ejected over Mexico.

programme.title: Dirty 30
programme.desc: On the eve of a woman's 30th birthday, she agrees to let her two lifelong friends throw her a party. But what's supposed to be a simple celebration becomes a wild who's who of past and present, and things quickly spiral out of control.

programme.title: Alan Partridge
programme.desc: When famous DJ Alan Partridge's radio station is taken over by a new media conglomerate, it sets in motion a chain of events which see Alan having to work with the police to defuse a potentially violent siege.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Vienna, a magician uses his abilities to secure the love of a woman far above his social standing.

programme.title: Species III
programme.desc: In the ongoing fight for supremacy between mankind and the human-alien hybrids, a fatal hybrid weakness has given humans the advantage. Until now.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Welcome to Belko Industries, a normally calm workplace that's about to devolve into a blood-soaked battle royale of bone-crunching horror when 80 employees are locked in their office building and forced to play a ruthless game of kill or be killed!

programme.title: Rise Of The Superheroes
programme.desc: This is the story of how comic book superheroes were brought to life in cinema, from Tim Burton’s Batman films to The Avengers, Black Panther and beyond, and how they first took over Hollywood and then conquered the world.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: NEW HD TRANSFER. Everyone's favorite muck-encrusted plant-man falls in love with Dr. Arcane's sexy daughter and must rescue her from her father's nefarious and murderous plans.

programme.title: Buena Vista Social Club: Adios
programme.desc: Revisit with the remaining original members of the Buena Vista Social Club and explore their contribution to the unknown history of Cuba.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick mataría por tener un sombrero y una pistola que pertenecían a uno de los hombres de los que se sospechaba que era Jack el Destripador. Corey trabaja horas extra para adquirir un reloj de 1920.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick negocia el precio de unos anillos de cuando los 49ers de San Francisco ganaron el Super Bowl. ¿Podrá lograr una buena jugada? Corey y Rick ponen a prueba un fusil de pesca: ¿descubrirán aguas turbias en las características de este artículo?

programme.title: Familia de medianoche
programme.desc: La familia Ochoa opera una ambulancia privada en las áreas más ricas de la Ciudad de México, compitiendo con otros técnicos de emergencias médicas en una industria feroz y éticamente tensa.

programme.title: Islander
programme.desc: En 1877, la isla Robinson Crusoe fue adquirida por Alfred von Rodt, un aristócrata suizo optimista y explorador. La película "Islander" explora la vida contemporánea de los habitantes, ajenos a nacionalidades, en la isla.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La familia Fahey ha vivido en la misma casa en la ciudad de Galway, Irlanda, durante más de treinta años. Martha Fahey creció allí y ahora se prepara para criar a su hija en el mismo ambiente, con la ayuda de sus padres.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando las personas inocentes se ven atacadas por entidades provenientes del reino sobrenatural, ponen su confianza en manos de investigadores paranormales para que estos los protejan de lo desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fuerza de lo diabólico radica en el poder del engaño. De formas muy sutiles, destruye los lazos familiares y los de la amistad, desvirtúa las creencias de los creyentes y toma posesión de los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños recurrentes constituyen la manera en la que nuestra mente lidia con los problemas que debemos resolver. Pero ¿qué ocurre cuando la vida comienza a imitar los miedos más temibles del subconsciente?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños son vitales. Palpitan en nuestros corazones, resuenan en nuestras mentes, nos impulsan hacia adelante hasta que convertimos nuestra imaginación en acción y damos aliento a nuestros destinos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El hogar debería ser un remanso de solaz, un refugio de los males externos. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando un terror paranormal lo invade, y el hogar se convierte en una prisión?

programme.desc: Instintos Asesinos, que con imágenes impactantes y una narración atractiva, sumerge a la audiencia en la arena salvaje de los animales más mortíferos del mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: En el siglo XIX, Tokio, entonces conocida como Edo, era la ciudad más grande del mundo. Hoy, la megalópolis en expansión de esta "Capital del Este" es una yuxtaposición infinita de distritos, donde el futuro y el pasado coexisten.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: La única ciudad que se sienta a horcajadas sobre dos continentes, Estambul, una vez Bizancio y una vez Constantinopla, es la capital económica y cultural de Turquía. Disfruta de esta mirada privilegiada al interior de la ciudad de las 1.001 noches.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Casi todo es excusa para celebrar en Ibiza. Los ibicencos celebran en la playa, en barcos y en villas. Una isla rica en historia antigua, los lugareños también celebran fiestas tradicionales en sus pueblos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Esta es la legendaria St. Barts, una isla que ha combinado con éxito las tradiciones con el modernismo y sigue siendo un destino principal.

programme.title: Descubrir: Episodio 13: La Amazonía Ecuatoriana
programme.desc: Descubrir transporta al espectador a los destinos más famosos y por las rutas menos transitadas, donde uno puede sentirse un verdadero viajero, disfrutando de paisajes diferentes, conociendo otras gentes y mucho más

programme.title: Odisea Volcánica
programme.desc: Con aproximadamente 130 volcanes activos, Indonesia es posiblemente el lugar más activo de la tierra. El vulcanólogo Tom Pfeiffer dirige una expedición a algunos de los volcanes más remotos y poco visitados de Indonesia.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An undelivered letter that Jessica finds in an antique bureau, purchased at a rummage sale, unleashes arson and murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend, a top-flight homicide detective (Barry Newman), investigates the cover-up of a young woman's murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica may be forced into public office when a woman arrives in town claiming Cabot Cove's bachelor mayor is the father of her five children.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The questionable identity of a body found by a railroad track leads to murder and becomes the inspiration for Jessica's latest novel.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
