programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Rebecca is here today to demand that her sister, Robin, divorce so that she can marry her man! Next Chrissy is here to tell her boyfriend, John, that she's dumping him for his son! Later Paul wants to dump his pregnant girlfriend for their neighbor!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After causing Jasmine to have 4 miscarriages, she told Steve she was through with Tyrone. But having to support herself, Jasmine went back to him. Now Jasmine believes she could be pregnant again.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The Paternity drama explodes on today's MAURY! Could one woman's twins really have 2 different fathers? It's a one in a million DNA shot, but one that we have seen before on our show. Plus more wild DNA results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But now is Shenik sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kyle denies that he fathered Citasia’s child. His mom says that he’s lying. Then, Josh fathered 5 kids. Dana says that he better prepare for number 6 because she claims he’s the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last year, Maurice was caught cheating on Karen on The Maury Show and is back with his new fiancé Shauntia. Is he still cheating? Then, 17-year-old Destanee thinks the father of her baby is cheating...with her mother!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He's accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!

programme.desc: Shauna reveals to her fiance that stripping wasn't enough. She also fears that her fiance is not the father of their son! Then, Travis denies that he is the father of Tenisha's kid because he heard that she cheated on him.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens.

programme.title: 12 Dog Days Till Christmas
programme.desc: A troubled teen sentenced to community service at a dog shelter helps find homes for strays and in the process discovers a family for himself.

programme.title: A Christmas Karen
programme.desc: Karen is an entitled middle-aged woman whose demanding nature has alienated her loved ones. After a series of instances displaying her privilege, Karen receives an intervention from some unconventional spirits.

programme.title: 12 Pups of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman tasked with finding homes for 12 abandoned puppies before Christmas finds love with her co-worker just in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Another Christmas Kiss
programme.desc: A passionate, mistletoe-fueled kiss inspires a millionaire playboy and his sister’s workaholic assistant to take a romantic leap for Christmas.

programme.title: A Christmas Memory
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Buddy lives in a small Alabama town with his three elderly spinster cousins.

programme.title: A Christmas Snow
programme.desc: Kathleen Mitchell (Catherine Mary Stewart), has carried around the unwanted memory of her father abandoning her and her mother almost 30 years ago on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Doggone Christmas
programme.desc: A dog with telepathic abilities escapes a government lockdown and runs straight into the loving arms of two young brothers. But the Washington brass won’t give up their secret weapon that easily.

programme.title: A Fall City Christmas
programme.desc: With nowhere to go, a recently paroled thief, Jon Price, is forced to return to his small hometown right before Christmas. Unexpectedly, he meets a struggling, single mother who lives her life with hope and shows him kindness through gentle compassion.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Superstar Jack Nicholson as the President of the United States greeting invaders from outer space? Anything can and does happen when the twisted mind of director Tim Burton plunges planet Earth into complete pandemonium in this all-star sci-fi spoof.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Come join The Addams Family for the most hilarious scarefest of this season or any other! When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Undoubtedly the funniest film ever made about rock and roll, Rob Reiner's satire about an over-the-hill heavy metal band is a priceless look at the music business and it's madness.

programme.title: The Overnight
programme.desc: Alex (Adam Scott), Emily (Taylor Schilling) and their son RJ are new to LA. A chance meeting, introduces them to the mysterious Kurt (Jason Schwartzman), Charlotte and Max. A family playdate becomes increasingly interesting as the night goes on.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.desc: Superstar Jack Nicholson as the President of the United States greeting invaders from outer space? Anything can and does happen when the twisted mind of director Tim Burton plunges planet Earth into complete pandemonium in this all-star sci-fi spoof.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E005) - When one participant contracts a contagious skin condition, the other models fear for their safety and skin.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E006) - The participants learn about modeling contracts and brave the rain and wind for a sexy photoshoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E008) - The participants discover the difficulties of television interviews and one model receives some shocking news.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a pageant of Hello Kitty inspired couture. Rebecca Romijn (X-Men) and former Drag Race panelist Santino Rice guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in their final challenge - starring in the music video for RuPaul's hit 'Born Naked.' Michelle Visage, Carson Kressley and Ross Mathews judge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E009) - The girls go on safari to South Africa.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E010) - The models pose with nature’s elements, and one participant’s competitiveness upsets two of her rivals.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E011) - The models are given a unique dance challenge and one participant feels that a male model’s intense flirtation crosses the line.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S04E012) - Kahlen plays a prank on Christina, Tiffany discovers her distaste for sushi and other never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: A look back on the highlights, low-lights, and previously unseen footage as we race toward the climactic crowning of America's Next Drag Superstar.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: RuPaul puts America's fiercest drag queens to the test as they battle it out in fashion and performance challenges for a crown and cash prize.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Participants explore new - and risky - food sources in Mongolia. As the survivalists begin to settle into their new remote surroundings, they realize they're not the only predators on the prowl.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The survivalists begin to face threats as they work to secure food and finish their shelters. One participant is confronted by one of Mongolia's deadliest predators, while another fights a debilitating illness.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack is distraught and defensive when Chet Collins, whose son has been missing for 6 years, decides to search for him on his own because he thinks Jack has given up hope of finding him.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for an airline stewardess, Linda Schmidt (HEATHER DONAHUE - "The Blair Witch Project"), who disappeared on her way to the airport.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad investigate a bride who disappears from her wedding celebration. The groom has no explanation, although it appears that she left with someone she knew.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for a teenage girl, Clare Metcalf (AMBER TAMBLYN), who disappears from a mental hospital after she suffers an extreme psychotic episode.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a recently retired U.S. Army officer who disappears following a dinner in his honor given by former members of his Vietnam platoon.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a tenacious television reporter, Delia Rivers (APRIL GRACE), after she disappears in the middle of a dangerous, high-profile investigation.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack's squad looks for a young, idealistic and dedicated schoolteacher, Josh Abrams (CHRISTOPHER GORHAM), who disappeared after teaching a night class in the Bronx.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a boxer, Dante Jones, who vanishes before a much-anticipated fight at Madison Square Garden. Jones' career was better than ever when he disappeared.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack is at the center of an investigation into how missing persons cases have been handled, including such controversial cases as that of Graham Spaulding, an accused pedophile.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, Jack and his team search for an office worker, Sydney Harrison (MARSHA DIETLEIN BENNET), who disappeared from her building.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In part two of a two-part season finale, Jack's squad must determine the best course of action when Samantha is shot and possibly critically injured in a hostage situation.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a school bus full of students goes missing during its morning run in a wealthy district, Jack and the team suspect two troublemaking students, brothers Doug and Richard Carrol.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team try to find a priest, Father Henry Stephens (HECTOR ELIZONDO), who disappears from his church shortly after learning that he needs a liver transplant to survive.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Business owner Whitney Ridder disappears from her wealthy fiancé's home during a dinner party. Jack and his team soon discover that Ridder is a con artist using a false identity.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Man of the Year
programme.desc: A comedian who hosts a news satire program decides to run for president, and a computerized voting machine malfunction gets him elected.

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Dedicated to helping his big brother Al (Tim Matheson) win the race for Washington State governor, he turns every opportunity for votes into an embarrassing disaster.

programme.title: Canadian Bacon
programme.desc: Falling approval ratings and a sagging economy cause a desperate U.S. president to turn America against its most unlikely enemy, Canada. A Niagara Falls sheriff and his band of misfit deputies invade Canada leaving the President's plans in shambles.

programme.title: Clerks
programme.desc: The legendary indie film that launched the career of Kevin Smith and won over audiences with its raw energy, outrageous comedy, and a hip soundtrack. CLERKS features razor-sharp wit and the debut of pop-culture icons Jay and Silent Bob.

programme.title: Party Girl
programme.desc: In this raucous comedy, Parker Posey ("Scream 3") stars as a hard-partying NY club girl who takes a job as a librarian.

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Dedicated to helping his big brother Al (Tim Matheson) win the race for Washington State governor, he turns every opportunity for votes into an embarrassing disaster.

programme.title: UHF
programme.desc: The manager of a small-time UHF station which has the lowest ratings in the country inadvertently hits it big with his strange programming ideas to keep Channel 62 from going down the tubes.

programme.title: Holy Smoke
programme.desc: PJ Waters is a cult deprogrammer who meets his match when he is hired to "cure" the beautiful, intelligent, and iron-willed Ruth. It's no holds barred in this darkly hilarious electric battle of the sexes!

programme.title: Iris
programme.desc: True story of the lifelong romance between novelist Iris Murdoch and her husband John Bayley, from their student days through her battle with Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: Romance & Cigarettes
programme.desc: Musical set in Bensonhurst, N.Y. In it, a two-timing husband must choose between his mistress and his beleaguered wife.

programme.title: The Mexican
programme.desc: A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.

programme.title: Quinceanera
programme.desc: As Magdalena's 15th birthday approaches, her simple, blissful life is complicated by the discovery that she's pregnant. Kicked out of her house, she finds a new family with her great-granduncle and gay cousin.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Based on the classic 1868 novel about love, family and the female spirit, Louisa May Alcott tells the domestic saga of the March family.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Coraline
programme.desc: Coraline Jones discovers a secret world that's like her own, but better! When her Other Mother tries to keep her, Coraline must be brave to get home.

programme.title: Kubo And The Two Strings
programme.desc: When he accidentally summons an evil spirit, Kubo must recover his fallen samurai father’s mystical weaponry and discover his own magical powers.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.desc: Neapolitan meat and onion sauce over ziti; spaghetti alla puttanesca.

programme.title: The Vatican and the Third Reich
programme.desc: In the midst of WWII, Catholics looked to the pope to guide them. Hitler had already begun secretly launching his plan to exterminate the Jews of Europe.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Hitler, Himler, and the Occult
programme.desc: The link between Hitler, the esoteric mystical movement of the nineteenth century, and the Aryan mythology of the Waffen SS is finally established.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1888, a series of gruesome murders shocked London: The perpetrator was dubbed “Jack the Ripper”. This was the Victorian era when puritanism reigned and forensic science was in its infancy.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: Paris, January 1907. Albert Soleilland is accused of the rape and murder of a little girl – Marthe. The press details every step of the case as if it was a show.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1924 Hanover, the discovery of a hundred bones catches the authorities’ attention. The press covers the case and a suspect – Fritz Haarmann – is quickly arrested.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1929, seven members of Bugs Moran’s gang are assassinated in a garage by Al Capone’s henchmen.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In August 1933, Violette Nozière, 18, killed her father by poisoning in Paris. After a short period on the run, she was charged with murder and swiftly confessed to the crime, saying her motive was that he abused her.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On May 18th, 1936, Abe Sada killed her lover by “erotic asphyxia” then cut off his member and carved his name in her flesh. In a militarized Japan, the press was very interested in this crime with erotic and transgressive accents.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 8 July 1947, the US Air Force announced the discovery of a “flying disc” which had crashed in the Roswell area of New Mexico. This was the birth of the flying saucer phenomenon.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On October 1972, an Uruguayan plane crashed into the Andes. 72 days later, 16 survivors are found! The incredible rescue fascinated the media across the world. How did they survive? An unspeakable truth gradually emerges: to survive.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: 1978 Guyana: Reverend Jim Jones holds an apocalyptic mass. Its outcome was the sacrifice of 918 members of the Peoples Temple – an American cult founded in the middle of the 1950s. The entire world was horrified by the journalists’ accounts.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 31 August 1997, Princess Diana died alongside her companion, Dodi Al-Fayed, in a car crash in Paris, whilst being pursued by paparazzi. Her untimely death prompted an outpouring of grief in Britain and elsewhere in the world.

programme.title: How The Victorians Built England
programme.desc: In this episode, presenter Michael Buerk discovers how the Victorians created what we know as public transport.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: From two young first-time buyers looking to settle down to a family who have been scarred by a previous purchase, this search challenges Kirstie and Phil in ways they never anticipated.

programme.desc: An inside look at the man who embraced secret intelligence operations, deception and code-breaking as viable instruments of modern war.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén se convierte en una carrera todo terreno por un barrio. La policía encuentra un sospechoso fugitivo escondido en el clóset de su pariente. Una pelea domestica estalla por papas fritas y salsa.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía aprende que a veces ni el “taser” detiene a algunos sospechosos. La patrulla se acerca a una pareja en una misteriosa camioneta. La policía detiene a una persona que reacciona extremadamente cortés.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso intenta huir en el estacionamiento de un hotel. Agentes encuentran a dos hermanos peleando con cuchillos. Un revoltoso dispara su pistola de balines contra el hijo del vecino.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El nuevo jefe de policía supervisa una serie de compras de drogas encubiertas en la ciudad. Los oficiales arrestan a un borracho que no para de hablar. Una sospechosa de abuso doméstico acepta que le pegó a su marido tras una discusión por dinero.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Rogue NSA officers hijack the X-303 spaceship and demand that Adrian Conrad be brought to the ship. Using his Goa'uld knowledge, Conrad activates the X-303 and takes the ship light-years from Earth as O'Neill and Teal'c stage a daring rescues.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is marooned in deep space, Thor comes to the rescue. He then seek O'Neill's help to combat the Replicators. Convinced they will attack earth if not stopped, O'Neill stages a daring mission to stop the Replicators once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 returns from a mission with an artifact that triggers the ability to see hideous yet harmless life forms in a parallel reality. As the effect spreads to civilians, O'Neill and his team must find a solution before mass hysteria breaks out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Senator Kinsey suffers an assassination attempt while campaigning for the presidency, and O'Neill is caught on tape leaving the building where the shots were fired. With O'Neill behind bars, Carter, Teal'c and Jonas must prove his innocence.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Atlantis is suddenly plunged into darkness, with only the top tier of the central tower unaffected. As Sheppard and McKay attempt to get to the top level, they discover that a force field has been established to prevent them from gaining access.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While Richard Woolsey (Robert Picardo) struggles to keep his position as the leader of Atlantis, and McKay (David Hewlett) and Zelenka (David Nykl) investigate a mysterious find, Sheppard is captured by an old enemy with plans to invade the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When the Atlantis team is given two weeks of vacation leave, Dr. Rodney McKay reluctantly accepts an invitation by his former rival, Malcolm Tunney, to attend a scientific demonstration that he claims will be the solution to global warming.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Jennifer Keller is observed behaving very strangely, extensive testing reveals nothing abnormal. But McKay’s investigation leads him to suspect that Dr. Keller and Neela Casol, a notorious criminal, have switched consciousnesses.

programme.desc: Cole uses petty anger between Prue, Phoebe, and Piper to break their bond and destroy the very foundation of their powers, leaving the sisters defenseless against demonic attack.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Alex go white water rafting and camping trip. In the morning, a rafter is found dead. The group continues rafting to the nearest station for help. Meanwhile, there is a prison outbreak and convicts are heading towards the rapids.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker realizes the rafting guide is one of the escaped convicts who killed the real organizer. Walker must find a way to capture the convict and save the others on the rafting trip.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A former boyfriend of Alex is in trouble when a prison is released from jail, waiting for a new trial. The crime boss is killing the witnesses that put him in prison in the first place. Walker must save the witness so he can testify again.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Chloe has Melanie spy on Alec, Victoria is resistant to gaining weight for her Woody Allen film role, and Joy is inspired by her infant grandson Wilbur to go back to college.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie pretends to be dating respected actor Emmet Lawson to make Alec jealous, while Joy's attempt to fit in at college is mocked by Elka and her millennial study group.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka and Mamie Sue trick Joy into doing an ad for their senior dating service, Melanie obsessively texts an unresponsive Alec, and Victoria has a fake affair with Emmet.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While cosplaying, Melanie, Alec, Chloe, Joy and Sean get into a romantically complicated situation, as Victoria heads to Italy to investigate if Emmet is cheating on her.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While in church for Wilbur's christening, a reverend mediates Joy's friction with her mother, as well as Melanie's deception of Victoria with phony weight-loss candy.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Wayne, Paige and Adam are fed up with chauffeuring Bentley. They insist he get his learner’s permit even though he is scared of driving. Emmett attempts to help.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: When Adam injures himself while sneaking in from a party late at night, Emmett covers for him and has to endure the consequences. Wayne is worried about Adam’s football career and Bentley is jealous of all the attention he’s getting.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Derek’s mysterious behavior leads his brothers to surmise he has a girlfriend and are shocked to discover he’s actually in a choir. Much to Derek’s chagrin, Bentley, Paige and Emmett home in on their choir life.

programme.desc: Emmett convinces his siblings to create a haunted house. Adam and Emmett procure a very realistic fake cadaver from the teaching hospital, but it turns out the fake cadaver isn’t so fake…

programme.desc: The basement hockey tournament is cut short when Wayne enlists the kids to help him finish Paige's anniversary gift, an outdoor she-­shed.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Wayne and Paige ban Emmett from playing video games, sending him into a downward spiral. Paige seeks Adam’s help to improve her hand/eye coordination and Wayne reveals a secret about his past.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se queja con Gabriela de la paliza que le dieron los Reyes, Sara revela que él la atacó y le dice a Norma que su mamá y Dínora buscan alejarla de Juan. Óscar descubre a Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma renuncia al consultorio, le asusta la cercanía de Fernando con Juan David, también Ruth se retira de la Casa de Modas por presión de su mamá. Juan se niega a asistir a la cena de Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora tiene una trampa para comprometer a Juan, pero Franco y Óscar planean otra para ella. Ruth le cuenta a Raquel lo que dijo Calixto sobre su madre y Rosario le pide el divorcio a Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora estalla de rabia porque Juan no llega y su trampa se cae, Franco y Óscar le aclaran que él ama a Norma, quien lo busca en la hacienda. Las Elizondo creen que Martín fue secuestrado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma buscan a Dínora, la ven en una vergonzosa situación y ella no puede aclarar lo que pasó, atrapada en su red de mentiras. Gabriela y Fernando le echan a perder la fiesta a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta furioso al darse cuenta de que le arruinaron su mejor fiesta, Norma le reclama a Gabriela su complicidad con Dínora y corre a buscar a Juan, su madre acepta que se casen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando sigue a Sara y escondido, la ve con Franco, por lo que la insulta y le inventa mentiras, ella le da una bofetada y él busca a la aliada perfecta. Ruth defiende a los Reyes y a Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela interroga con insistencia a Fernando sobre el novio de Sara, Rosario le ruega a Franco que vuelva con ella, él le dice a quién ama; Armando da una orden, muy molesto con su esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la hacienda Elizondo, Rosario le jura a Sara que luchará por Franco, Norma interroga a su hermana, quien delante de Jimena, dice que lo ama. Ruth escucha que es adoptada, Raquel le miente.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se percata de los dos hombres que acechan a Franco y responde con rapidez, Ruth, sin saber a dónde ir, huye de casa de Raquel. Dínora busca a Gabriela con otro ardid contra Juan y Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se desvela de la angustia y Eva la consuela, Hortencia se desmaya al ver al fantasma de Libia y pide perdón. Fernando desafía a Sara, al tiempo que Memo cumple la orden de su jefe Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia tiembla porque Libia regresó para vengarse, Manolo confiesa lo sucedido la noche en la que la joven se suicidó tras visitar a los Elizondo. Memo le dice a Armando que mató a Rosario.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams continue racing through Corsica, France, where each team member must try a piece of casu martzu, also known as maggot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Halkidiki, Greece, where they are tested on their spelling and memory skills.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers leave no stone unturned while looking for a clue in Thessaloniki, Greece.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After traveling to seven countries and 17 cities, one team will be crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven of the most memorable teams return for another Race around the world, but in a dramatic series first, one team will not make it to the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Mark and Mallory continue to struggle with communication and one major mistake jeopardizes their chances to keep racing.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through the Malaysian jungle where the roaring rapids crush their spirits and their homemade rafts. Plus, after being struck by taxi deja vu, one team fights to stay in the running.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One racer pours blood and tears into an exhausting Roadblock and another racer suffers a meltdown during an extremely difficult Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race continues in Sri Lanka where teams struggle to get a bite when fishing for their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The teams are in Sri Lanka, where an exhausting Roadblock drains the racers of all their strength. Also, an epic race through the countryside ends with a footrace to the Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race to Rome, Italy, where Racers and Roman gladiators square off in a medieval Detour. Plus, three teams strike a deal in order to try to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition gets fierce as the remaining six teams face a double U-Turn, and the Cowboys contemplate a major decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the final finish line getting closer, tension between two teams rises. Meanwhile, three teams make a final three alliance in hopes of making it to the final leg.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie and then Opie's wishes seem to begin to come true.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis slips and falls in jail and is convinced by a lawyer that he should sue the county.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife decides to dabble in real estate as a side job. He tries to get the sheriff to put his house up for sale.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober dismantles a car in the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis (Hal Smith) rides into Mayberry on a cow under the impression it is a horse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife believes he's hexed when several accidents happen after he fails to continue a lucky chain letter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney think they'll have some privacy with their girlfriends after Goober finds a girl of his own. But they discover Goober favors triple dates.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney runs for sheriff when Andy seems lined up for another job. Andy's job falls through and he becomes a write-in candidate for re-election.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney finds $250,000 in cash from a bank robbery and decides to capture the robber himself.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Travel with Jack, and his wife Sue, to beautiful Cape Town as they discover how South Africa's wildlife is faring in the big city! Then they hit the beach to hang out with a breeding colony of African Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Island Hopping
programme.desc: From the Florida Keys to Grand Cayman and all the way to Fiji, we’re going island hopping on today’s Wild Countdown! Most visitors hit the beaches, but ole’ Jungle Jack heads straight to the rare and unique wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to Zimbabwe! Just around the corner from majestic Victoria Falls, the folks at Elephant Camp are working to provide a home to orphaned Elephants in need. Jack assists the team in radio collaring a soon-to-be-released female.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack on an amazing safari through Kenya's Masai Mara as he braves the rushing Mara River filled with Hippos and Nile Crocs. Then Jack explores wildlife after dark.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his wife Sue as they pay a visit to the sunny state of Florida's most unique and inspirational retirement home. They meet up with an amazing couple who is spending their golden years providing a safe and peaceful retirement for horses.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is taking his show on the road through sunny California!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen depart Juneau, Alaska aboard the Wilderness Explorer in search of the endless natural beauty of Glacier Bay. Among their encounters: are bears, humpback whales, and glaciers. Jack also explores an old gold mine.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Guayaquil, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen visit a park in the mangroves that preserves Ecuador's rural culture, as well as many of the country's endangered animals, including harpy eagle, tapir, tigerill and ocelot.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Guides
programme.desc: Join Jack on a Wild Countdown safari to South Africa, Peru, Kenya, Borneo, and Namibia with Jack’s favorite guides leading the way to see cheetahs, lions, rhinos, pink dolphins, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: What could be better than getting up-close animal encounters with wildlife from Africa, Asia, and North America? Doing it all in one place, right here in the ole' US of A!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: You're Endangered, Baby
programme.desc: What does it take to save a species from extinction? Patience, education and lots of babies! Today, Jungle Jack is counting down six endangered species surviving against all odds -- one baby at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In southern Brazil, Jack and Kathaleen boat up a raging river to Iguassu Falls, the world's largest. At the base of the falls, dad and daughter marvel at the unusual nesting site for thousands of Swifts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with delicious and nutritious adventures. From carnivores like jackals, lions, and sharks to our vegetarian friends, the elephants, Jungle Jack is gearing up for a Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack to the Future
programme.desc: Today, it’s a two-for-one special, as Jack travels to each location TWICE! Cheetahs, rhinos, manatees, kangaroos and more! Join Jack for time-traveling tour through natural history.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of life on the Hanna's farm. Then he and Sue meet a couple that have dedicated their lives to providing a home for disabled dogs, cats, and horses. Jack heads to the eastern front of the Rocky Mountains for an old-fashioned cattle drive!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack trades his safari suit for a wet suit as he dives in with bottle-nosed dolphins! Jack and Sue, get more than they bargained for as they go along for the ride with dolphins on their daily outing into the open ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen travel to northern Canada for encounters with Beluga whales and Polar bears. At Churchill, the Hannas find Hudson Bay much to their liking, but nothing tops the small town's hottest summer pastime.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he reveals how to tell the difference between some commonly confused creatures, like Cheetahs and Leopards, Crocs and Gators, Penguins and Puffins, Turtles and Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Adaptations
programme.desc: From the Arctic to the desert, animals have found a way to survive and thrive in every eco-system on the planet. Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing animal adaptations.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Ex Plus Y," newlyweds Terri and Ron Larson (Loretta "M*A*S*H" Swit and Richard "Soap" Mulligan) are adjusting well until Terri encounters ex-husband Barney (Robert Reed) aboard ship with his lady friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.desc: Daryl Dixon's arrival to France sets off a violent chain of events that inadvertently puts a young boy at the heart of a growing religious movement in danger; Daryl agrees to help shepherd the boy to safety in exchange for help returning to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: The group arrives in Paris, where Isabelle confronts her past while growing closer to Daryl; Codron seeks help from the leader of a growing nationalist movement called Pouvoir, putting the Union of Hope and Laurent under dangerous scrutiny.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl and Isabelle must negotiate with Quinn, the proprietor of the underground Demimonde club, the last vestige of art and expression in Paris.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl faces old demons, recalling the circumstances that landed him in France; Isabelle's sacrifice forces her to consider drastic measures; Genet commences a celebration for the people of Paris.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Genet solidifies her base of power; Daryl has a job to do before he can return to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Durante una tormenta espectacular, Rick y el grupo conocen a unas personas aparentemente amistosas. ¿Serán dignas de confianza, o solo intentan manipular a Rick?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Adaptarse a un nuevo estilo de vida resulta difícil para el grupo. Quizás la vida en la carretera haya sido demasiado traicionera para que vuelvan a ser lo que alguna vez fueron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo continúan la adaptación a su nuevo entorno. ¿Serán capaces de volver a la normalidad? O mejor aún, ¿qué es lo normal ahora?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo enfrentan desafíos que ponen en riesgo su vida mientras intentan que su nuevo hogar sea un lugar seguro. ¿Valdrá realmente la pena esa nueva utopía?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre, poco a poco, que la vida en su refugio empieza a replicar las adversidades que enfrentaron afuera. ¿Podrá Rick soportarlo?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl está en peligro, mientras Rick y el grupo continúan sintiendo que no pertenecen a Alexandria, donde los problemas comienzan a filtrarse.

programme.desc: Contains discriminatory language. Jeremy, Richard and James take an Aston Martin DBS Volante, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Spyder to Romania in search of an obscure stretch of tarmac.

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Giorgio Campanella
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Oscar De La hoya fought Giorgio Campanella at the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas for the WBO World Super Featherweight title with De La Hoya knocking out Campanella in the thrid round securing his victory.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Lloyd Honeyghan vs Donald Curry
programme.desc: On September 27th, 1986 Lloyd Honeyghan faced Donald Curry for the IBF, WBA and WBC World Welterweight title at the Caesars Palace in Atlantic City in a 15 round bout that ended in the sixth giving Honeyghan the win.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 2
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1996 Montell Griffin and James Toney fought for a second time at the Lawlor Events Center in Reno for World Light Heavyweight titles resulting in an unanimous decision win for Griffin.

programme.title: Best of Xander Zayas
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Xander Zayas.

programme.title: Shakur Steveson vs Felix Caraballo
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2020, a young Shakur Stevenson fought Felix Caraballo in a super featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand. After knocking down Caraballo in rounds 1 and 6, Stevenson would get the KO with a devastating body shot in round six.

programme.title: Devin Haney vs Rafael Vazquez
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Devin Haney and Rafael Vazquez fought eachother at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 4 rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Haney.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Antonio Margarito
programme.desc: On January 24th, 2009 Shane Mosley and Antonio Margarito fought for WBA Super World Welterweight title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles with what was supposed to be a 12 round bout only went nine resulting in a victory for Mosley.

programme.title: Donald Curry vs Milton McCrory
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1985, Donald Curry fought Milton McCrory for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Welterweight Titles in Las Vegas. Putting on the pressure early, Donald Curry came out firing, knocking out McCrory in the second round.

programme.title: Best of Manny Pacquiao

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 1
programme.desc: On June 6th, 1988 Iran Barkley faces Thomas Hearns for the first time at the Las Vegas Hilton Center they battle for the WBC World Middleweight title with the bout lasting 3 rounds resulting in a victory for Barkley.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Adam Lopez
programme.desc: On June 19th, 2021 Issac Dogboe faced Adam Lopez in a 10 round bout for the North American Boxing Federation Featherweight title that ended in a majority decision victory for Dogboe.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: From its geological history going back millions of years to the origins of the indigenous Eskimos that have inhabited the land for hundreds of years, this one-hour special will examine in depth the changes that have taken place in Yellowknife.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. Tensions are sure to be high as both Rick and Drew have not spoken to Hugh since leaving the ice roads prematurely.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers continue their look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. We'll also take a look at the town of Yellowknife--and the mining industry--and see what life is like.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On one of the coldest frontiers on the planet, the Ice Road Truckers brave treacherous terrain to deliver crucial supplies to northern diamond mines. Take a look back at the highs and lows of the first season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It is a job only a few would dare. This year, four ice road truckers, Hugh, Alex, Rick, and Drew, return from last season to join Arctic veterans as they venture 200 miles north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After just two days in the Arctic, the critical demands of the oil exploration sites are testing the limits of the truckers and their machines. Both the veterans and rookies are delayed in the shop by mechanical failures.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Just five days into the Arctic adventure, Mother Nature is about to strike and wreak havoc on the ice roads. Making matters worse is a report of a trucker who has run off the road and is stranded on the weakest part.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After the storm clears, most of the truckers are ready to roll--all except Rick, who is on the verge of quitting and looks to Hugh for advice. For a second time, Jerry attempts the MGM camp move, including the transport of an expensive 50-ton derrick.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers have delivered the fragile 135-foot derrick to the new MGM exploration site, but before it can be erected, they must also transport the 80-ton substructure that will form its base.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Bear and Eric must haul a boiler and a flare stack--two critical pieces of equipment--to Langley at the same time that a polar bear is spotted in the area. In this region of the Arctic.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After being Med-Evaced to Yellowknife hospital, Alex receives a grim diagnosis that could mean the end of his Ice Road season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Research site before the ice road melts, but while scientists are on the verge of a historic breakthrough, the truckers are starting to haul away equipment piece-by-piece.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Tempers have reached a fever pitch in logging country. At Rygaard, three years of tension between Craig and DJ come to a head. In the swamp, the Swamp Man is on a special mission for his wife Donna.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap. When the imposter attempts to lead the others deep into a mine containing a substance lethal to Autobots, it becomes a question of which "Prime" is really Prime.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons discover the lost civilization of Atlantis in the depths of the ocean. Still inhabited, the lost city is led by a king as power-hungry and deceitful as Megatron. The two forces unite and besiege Washington, D.C. with an energy shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor, so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful “Heart of Cybertron.”

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful "Heart of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons and Insecticons team up to attack a defense base filled with data that Megatron wants to get his hands on. When the Insecticons connect with the base's energy shield, they unexpectedly grow larger…and potentially explosive!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun due to a plan by Megatron and human industrialist Sean Burger. With the Autobots gone, the Decepticons are free to do as they please.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and his team do more than remodel when they give brand new life to two of his first builds in need of major makeovers.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete builds a 600-square foot Western-style man-cave tree house that includes a cigar humidor, a meat smoker, and a flat-screen TV, for a father of three daughters in Texas.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson uproots an existing treehouse from the family-owned bed & breakfast Treehouse Point to build a custom-made treehouse as a housewarming gift for his daughter, Emily.
